arts.ttl: Premier League explain why Southampton were given controversial penalty against Liverpool
arts.sum: The Premier League's official X account has provided VAR's reasoning for why they allowed a controversial penalty to stand.

arts.ttl: Jamie Carragher makes brutal Virgil van Dijk comment live on Sky Sports after Liverpool moment
arts.sum: Liverpool conceded a penalty late in the first half against Southampton on Sunday afternoon

arts.ttl: 'He looks like' - Roy Keane sends Man United savage Mo Salah jibe as Liverpool star verdict given
arts.sum: Former Manchester United defender Roy Keane has praised Liverpool star Mohamed Salah

arts.ttl: Report: Liverpool star is ready to end speculation by signing new deal at the club
arts.sum: Some of the Liverpool players are facing an uncertain future at the club. Mohamed Salah, Virgil Van Dijk and Trent Alexander-Arnold are all in the final year of their contract at the club and their long term future at Anfield is still not resolved. All the three players have been the pillar of the Liverpool […] The post Report: Liverpool star is ready to end speculation by signing new deal at the club appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Why was Southampton penalty against Liverpool given and not overturned by VAR? Premier League explains
arts.sum: Referee Samuel Barrott pointed to the spot judging the Reds’ Andy Robertson had taken down Tyler Dibling inside the penalty area. The Premier League itself explained the decision on its Premier League Match Centre account on X: “The referee’s call of penalty for the challenge by Robertson on Dibling is checked and confirmed by VAR, who deemed there was no conclusive evidence that the contact occurred outside the penalty area ”.

arts.ttl: “Should be three times that” – Jamie Carragher not impressed with numbers of £60m Liverpool goalscorer
arts.sum: Liverpool took the lead in their Premier League clash with Southampton on Sunday afternoon as Dominik Szoboszlai opened the scoring with a stunning finish, however, Jamie Carragher has admitted that he has not been impressed with the Hungarian talent so far at Anfield. arts.ttl: Premier League release statement to explain VAR decision for Southampton penalty vs Liverpool
arts.sum: Southampton were awarded a penalty against Liverpool at St Mary's even though the offence appeared to take place outside of the area

arts.ttl: Why Southampton Were Awarded Controversial Penalty vs Liverpool
arts.sum: Samuel Barrott upheld his decision to award Southampton a penalty after deliberating with VAR.

arts.ttl: Fans fume as Sky Sports miss coverage of Liverpool goal to show 'absolutely pointless replay'
arts.sum: Liverpool took the lead after half an hour of the clash at St Mary's through Dominik Szoboszlai, but Sky Sports were showing a replay of a different incident at the time

arts.ttl: BREAKING: Premier League issue statement on Liverpool penalty controversy vs Southampton
arts.sum: Adam Armstrong got Southampton level after Tyler Dibling was fouled by Andy Robertson, with VAR replays suggesting the offence may have occurred just outside the penalty area
